verdict.summary: API request timed out. Long generation, network issues, or API overload.

dead_ends.action: Set timeout to very large value (300s+)
dead_ends.why_fails: Extremely long timeouts tie up resources; if the API is overloaded your request will likely fail anyway

dead_ends.action: Retry the exact same long prompt immediately
dead_ends.why_fails: If the prompt caused slow generation (long output), it will timeout again. Reduce max_tokens.

workarounds.action: Set reasonable timeout with retry logic
Reduce max_tokens to limit generation time
workarounds.how: Shorter responses generate faster; use max_tokens=1000 instead of 4096

workarounds.action: Use streaming to avoid timeout on long responses
